news.title: Aztec investigates $2 million exploit of deprecated payments product
news.summary: The immutable stage 2 rollup was sunset in 2022, and Aztec Labs holds no admin keys or control over the system, the team said.

news.title: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
news.summary: Outgoing CME chief Terry Duffy says perpetual futures are actually swaps under Dodd-Frank, and that the exchange will file suit Thursday.

news.title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
news.summary: BTC slid to around $64,100 after Kevin Warsh's hawkish debut, but analysts argue a $60,000 floor and catalysts could spark a rebound.

news.title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
news.summary: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.

news.title: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
news.summary: Bitcoin could be absent from the world's top five assets by market cap until 2036, despite an estimate seeing the BTC bear market being nearly 70% complete.

news.title: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
